data.description:
To create an account for a workspace, following are the steps:

- **Step 1**: `GET /workspaces/:workspaceId/provisioning-meta` This returns a list of fields.
- **Step 2**: `POST /workspaces/:workspaceId/accounts` Make a request based on the meta response from the previous step.
- **Step 3**: `GET /requests/:requestId` Use requestId from previous step to check status

Continue polling this API until status changes to “finished” or “failed”. There will be a rate limit on this API, so please use an interval of 1s.

workflowRunId.description: The ID of the workflow run.

searchFields.description: Array of field names to search within when using searchTerm. Supports memo, people fields, preset fields, and custom fields

filters.description: The object key is the field name, and the value is the filter options. Keys look like `preset.<unique field name>`. There are certain extra virtual fields, such as `$age`, please check implementation or ask a backend engineer.

contractStartAt.description: Contract start date of the employee. Date-only strings (e.g. "2021-01-01") are interpreted as UTC midnight. To specify a local midnight in a specific timezone, provide a full ISO 8601 datetime with offset (e.g. "2020-12-31T15:00:00.000Z" for 2021-01-01 00:00 JST).

contractEndAt.description: Contract end date of the employee. Date-only strings (e.g. "2021-01-02") are interpreted as UTC midnight. To specify a local midnight in a specific timezone, provide a full ISO 8601 datetime with offset (e.g. "2021-01-01T15:00:00.000Z" for 2021-01-02 00:00 JST).

suspensionStartAt.description: Suspension start date of the employee. Date-only strings (e.g. "2021-01-01") are interpreted as UTC midnight. To specify a local midnight in a specific timezone, provide a full ISO 8601 datetime with offset (e.g. "2020-12-31T15:00:00.000Z" for 2021-01-01 00:00 JST).

suspensionEndAt.description: Suspension end date of the employee. Date-only strings (e.g. "2021-01-03") are interpreted as UTC midnight. To specify a local midnight in a specific timezone, provide a full ISO 8601 datetime with offset (e.g. "2021-01-02T15:00:00.000Z" for 2021-01-03 00:00 JST).

contractEndAt.description: Contract end date of the employee. Date-only strings (e.g. "2021-01-02") are interpreted as UTC midnight. To specify a local midnight in a specific timezone, provide a full ISO 8601 datetime with offset (e.g. "2021-01-01T15:00:00.000Z" for 2021-01-02 00:00 JST).

suspensionStartAt.description: Suspension start date of the employee. Date-only strings (e.g. "2021-01-01") are interpreted as UTC midnight. To specify a local midnight in a specific timezone, provide a full ISO 8601 datetime with offset (e.g. "2020-12-31T15:00:00.000Z" for 2021-01-01 00:00 JST).

suspensionEndAt.description: Suspension end date of the employee. Date-only strings (e.g. "2021-01-03") are interpreted as UTC midnight. To specify a local midnight in a specific timezone, provide a full ISO 8601 datetime with offset (e.g. "2021-01-02T15:00:00.000Z" for 2021-01-03 00:00 JST).

profileUrl.description: URL of the profile of the employee

customFieldsWithMetadata.description: Custom fields with metadata including ID, uniqueName, and label

id.description: The ID of the custom field template

attributeCode.description: The unique identifier for the custom field

attributeName.description: The display label for the custom field

value.description: The value of the custom field (string, number, or date string depending on the field type)

companies.description: Companies that the identity is a member of

departments.description: Departments that the identity is a member of

locations.description: Locations that the identity is a member of

tools.name: public_merge_identities
tools.description: Merge identity with another one in batch

peopleIds.description: List of people IDs to unmerge.

identityIds.description: List of identity IDs to unmerge.

parameters.name: expands
parameters.description: Expand other datasets when fetching identities. Accepts multiple options.

expands.description: Expand other datasets when fetching identities. Accepts multiple options.

contractStartAt.description: Contract start date of the employee. Date-only strings (e.g. "2021-01-01") are interpreted as UTC midnight. To specify a local midnight in a specific timezone, provide a full ISO 8601 datetime with offset (e.g. "2020-12-31T15:00:00.000Z" for 2021-01-01 00:00 JST).

contractEndAt.description: Contract end date of the employee. Date-only strings (e.g. "2021-01-02") are interpreted as UTC midnight. To specify a local midnight in a specific timezone, provide a full ISO 8601 datetime with offset (e.g. "2021-01-01T15:00:00.000Z" for 2021-01-02 00:00 JST).

suspensionStartAt.description: Suspension start date of the employee. Date-only strings (e.g. "2021-01-01") are interpreted as UTC midnight. To specify a local midnight in a specific timezone, provide a full ISO 8601 datetime with offset (e.g. "2020-12-31T15:00:00.000Z" for 2021-01-01 00:00 JST).

suspensionEndAt.description: Suspension end date of the employee. Date-only strings (e.g. "2021-01-03") are interpreted as UTC midnight. To specify a local midnight in a specific timezone, provide a full ISO 8601 datetime with offset (e.g. "2021-01-02T15:00:00.000Z" for 2021-01-03 00:00 JST).

tools.name: get_identity_custom_fields
tools.description: Get all custom fields of an organization

tools.name: create_identity_custom_field
tools.description: Create a custom field for an organization

attributeCode.description: Unique identifier for the custom field. Must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores. If not provided, will be auto-generated.

tools.name: update_identity_custom_field
tools.description: Update a custom field for an organization

attributeCode.description: Unique identifier for the custom field. Must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores. Cannot be changed to a value that already exists in the organization.

tools.name: delete_identity_custom_field
tools.description: Delete a custom field for an organization

tools.name: public_update_device_meta
tools.description: Update device's meta information (assignment info and location)

peopleId.description: The people ID to assign the device to. If `null`, the device will be unassigned. **Device that has `IN_STOCK` or `DECOMMISSIONED` status can't be assigned to a person**

assignmentStartDate.description: The date the device is assigned to the person. **Device that has `IN_STOCK` or `DECOMMISSIONED` can't have assignment start date**

assignmentEndDate.description: The date the device assignment ends. **Device that has `IN_STOCK` or `DECOMMISSIONED` can't have assignment end date**

location1.description: Primary location information for the device

location2.description: Secondary location information for the device

comment.description: Comment or reason for the assignment/status change

tools.name: public_create_device_history
tools.description: Create history entry of a device of an organization

peopleId.description: The people ID of the person the device is assigned to. **peopleId must not be present if status is in_stock or decommissioned**

assignmentStartDate.description: The assignment start date of the device. **assignmentStartDate must not be present if status is in_stock or decommissioned**

assignmentEndDate.description: The assignment end date of the device. **assignmentEndDate must not be present if status is in_stock or decommissioned. Assignment end date must be after assignment start date**

tools.name: public_delete_device_histories
tools.description: Delete multiple history entries of a device of an organization

deviceHistoryIds.description: Array of device history entry IDs to delete. Maximum 50 IDs per request.

tools.name: public_update_device_history
tools.description: Update history entry of a device of an organization

peopleId.description: The people ID of the person the device is assigned to. **peopleId must not be present if status is in_stock or decommissioned**

assignmentStartDate.description: The assignment start date of the device. **assignmentStartDate must not be present if status is in_stock or decommissioned**

assignmentEndDate.description: The assignment end date of the device. **assignmentEndDate must not be present if status is in_stock or decommissioned. Assignment end date must be after assignment start date**

tools.name: public_delete_device_history
tools.description: Delete a single history entry of a device of an organization

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Filter event logs from this start date. Supports both date format (YYYY-MM-DD) and ISO 8601 datetime format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.sssZ).

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Filter event logs up to this end date. Supports both date format (YYYY-MM-DD) and ISO 8601 datetime format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.sssZ).

parameters.name: searchText
parameters.description: Search text to filter event logs by user email, service name, or event details.

parameters.name: showUnmatched
parameters.description: Include unmatched event logs (events that couldn't be matched to known users).

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of items to return per page.

parameters.name: nextCursor
parameters.description: Cursor for pagination. Use the nextCursor value from the previous response to fetch the next page.

serviceIds.description: Service IDs for which to mute alerts (max 50)

alertType.description: Optional: Specific alert type to mute (if not provided, mutes all alert types for the services)

reason.description: Optional reason for muting. Alert type mutes are permanent until explicitly unmuted.

serviceIds.description: Service IDs for which to unmute alerts (max 50)

alertType.description: Optional: Specific alert type to unmute (if not provided, unmutes all alert types for the services)

accountIds.description: Account IDs (peopleAccountIds) to mute alerts for

until.description: Optional: Timestamp until when the alert should be muted (ISO 8601 format). If not provided, mutes indefinitely.

muteOtherAccounts.description: Whether to also mute other accounts of the same people

accountIds.description: Account IDs (peopleAccountIds) to unmute alerts for

unmuteOtherAccounts.description: Whether to also unmute other accounts of the same people

fileIds.description: File IDs to mute public file alerts for
